falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would indicate extreme volatility/panic, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a potential market reversal or crash

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5000 (resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the pattern similarity and suggest a bullish trend contrary to the current 'HOLD' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surge exceeds 200% of 30-day average on the NASDAQ
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a confirmed market move (either bullish or bearish), directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal which implies market indecision

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
